---
title: "Rāg Śukla belāvalī"
subtitle: "*Jñāna raṅga dhyāna*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Nāyak baiju &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jhāpatāl (Madhyalay)
:::


## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> jñāna raṅga dhyāna raṅga raṅga aura vijñāna  
> raṅga mana raṅga saba aṅgana raṅga raṅga

**Antarā**

> prathama rāmakṛṣṇa raṅga rahima karima raṅga  
> ghaṭa ghaṭa brahma raṅga vyoma vyoma tanu raṅga  
> hara raṅga raṅga

**Sanchārī**

> japa raṅga tapa raṅga tīratha brata nema raṅga  
> sarvamayī karama dharma jaga raṅga raṅga

**Ābhog**

> jīva jantu pannaga paśu eka īśvara  
> raṅga raṅga sura nara muni saṅga  
> baiju prabhu kṛṣṇa raṅga raṅga

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jhāpatāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **2 + 3 + 2 + 3** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 3, **O** (khālī) at beat 6, and **3** at beat 8. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| R | - | R | R | R | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | - | R | G | G |
| **jñā** | **-** | **na** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **dhyā** | **-** | **na** | **ra** | **ṅga** |
| S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | - | S |
| **ra** | **ṅga** | **ou** | **-** | **ra** | **vi** | **-** | **jñā** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{R}}$ | - | R | R | R | R | - | R | G | G |
| **jñā** | **-** | **na** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **dhyā** | **-** | **na** | **ra** | **ṅga** |
| S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | - | m |
| **ra** | **ṅga** | **ou** | **-** | **ra** | **vi** | **-** | **jñā** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{D}}$ | m | m | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | P | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **ma** | **na** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **sa** | **ba** |
| n | D | P | n | D | $\lb{\mathrm{Pm}}$ | m | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | S |
| **a** | **ṅga** | **na** | **-** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pra** | **tha** | **ma** | **rā** | **ma** | **kṛ** | **ṣṇa** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ra** | **hi** | **ma** | **-** | **ka** | **ri** | **ma** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| P | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pra** | **tha** | **ma** | **rā** | **ma** | **kṛ** | **ṣṇa** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ra** | **hi** | **ma** | **-** | **ka** | **ri** | **ma** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | D | P |
| **gha** | **ṭa** | **gha** | **ṭa** | **-** | **bra** | **hma** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{D}}$ | - | m | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | P | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **vyo** | **-** | **ma** | **vyo** | **ma** | **ta** | **nu** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| n | D | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | n | D | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{m}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | S |
| **ha** | **ra** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **ṅga** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | D | P | P | P | D | m |
| **ja** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **ta** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| G | R | G | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{D}}$ | m | G | - | R |
| **tī** | **ra** | **tha** | **bra** | **ta** | **ne** | **ma** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| S | S | G | G | G | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | - | m |
| **sa** | **rva** | **ma** | **yī** | **ka** | **ra** | **ma** | **dha** | **-** | **rma** |
| P | P | P | D | m | G | R | G | m | - |
| **ja** | **ga** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | P | N | D | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **jī** | **va** | **ja** | **-** | **ntu** | **pa** | **-** | **nna** | **ga** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pa** | **śu** | **e** | **-** | **ka** | **ī** | **-** | **śva** | **ra** | **-** |
| P | P | N | D | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **jī** | **va** | **ja** | **-** | **ntu** | **pa** | **-** | **nna** | **ga** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pa** | **śu** | **e** | **-** | **ka** | **ī** | **-** | **śva** | **ra** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | D | P |
| **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **ra** | **ṅga** | **su** | **ra** | **na** | **-** | **ra** |
| D | m | G | R | G | m | P | P | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **mu** | **ni** | **sa** | **-** | **ṅga** | **bai** | **-** | **ju** | **pra** | **bhu** |
| n | D | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | n | D | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{m}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | S |
| **kṛ** | **ṣṇa** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **ṅga** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** |

:::
